caption: A man wearing a black t-shirt with the words "CHECK IT" and a black baseball cap with a blue logo sits in a studio setting. He wears gold chains and a gold bracelet on his right wrist, and has large grey over-ear headphones on. He is positioned in front of a professional studio microphone. In the background, a white wall features gold stars and the phrase "EMPOWER HUSTLE" repeated. A screen behind him displays the words "BOSS TALK 101". On-screen graphics include a logo that says "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" on the left and "BOSS TALK 101" on the right. Throughout the sequence, the man remains seated and looks toward someone off-screen to his right. His expression and posture stay relatively constant, though his right hand moves slightly from a gesture toward his chest to resting closer to the table.
